【价值：废品】
【装备效果：演技+200%、剑仙气质+999%、身手+999%。酒剑仙契合度：100%！】
江海觉醒神级道具系统，从此，别人演戏靠抠图，他演戏靠“捡破烂”。
随便拎起个酒壶，他便是御剑乘风、除魔天地的酒剑仙！
换上西装，他化身优雅与暴力并存的西装暴徒！
挂上披风，他便是听调不听宣的司法天神二郎神！
点燃一根香烟，风衣猎猎，纵横四海，他诠释了什么叫真正的英雄本色！
黄袍加身，他便是天上天下唯我独尊的千古帝王，眼神所至，群演跪伏。
导演惊呼：“我让你演戏，没让你穿越！”
观众质疑：“建议查查江海，他那龙袍看着不像演的，像刚从皇陵里顺出来的！”
江海摊手：“基操勿六，我只是演技没有上限。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d1a00f09def0ad0e2749190ce2b6f113","author":"不如去吹吹风","author_id":"","book_id":"7583079768367582233","book_name":"试镜酒剑仙：我酒壶一挂，御剑来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"52.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583752119568564761","read_count":"526792","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"689835"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"317","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,娱乐圈,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bb1aaa8fbcff4fa52ca4e40fdf1061d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173182&x-signature=vFHWs57V3K9hJiiggOvAgZgL9QI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"70055587051","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"116"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201446225FF54A4EB566C7A85BC2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"li
